headline: Flip Flop Johnson Launches 'Left Shoe Only' Fashion Line, Calls Right Shoes 'Oppressive'
summary: The collection sold out in 4 minutes to people who 'just want to be different.'
fullBody: Flip Flop Johnson, the eccentric footwear designer, has launched a controversial new fashion line featuring only left shoes. 'Right shoes represent conformity and oppression,' Johnson declared at a press conference where he wore two left shoes. Critics argue the collection is 'lopsided' and 'impractical,' but fans praise the 'asymmetrical freedom.' Johnson is already working on his next collection: mismatched socks that 'reject societal pairing.'
